# Exhibitor Retention

> **Type:** Analytics
> **Provenance:** 1P
> **Contexts:** [exhibitor, exhibition-space, finance]
> **Measures:** [exhibitor-lifecycle-management]

## Purpose

THE leading indicator for AXPONA's revenue health. Exhibitor rebooking rate within 30 days of show close predicts next-year space revenue (65% of total). At 80% rebooking, ~150 new brands per year are needed to maintain 750+. A 10-point drop means the 3-person sales team can't replace churn fast enough.

## Metrics

| Metric | Formula | Dimensions | Refresh |
|--------|---------|------------|---------|
| **rebooking_rate_30d** | COUNT(rebooked_within_30d) / COUNT(eligible_exhibitors) | edition, space_type | per-edition |
| **net_exhibitor_growth** | new_exhibitors - churned_exhibitors | edition | per-edition |
| **avg_contract_value** | total_exhibitor_revenue / exhibitor_count | edition, space_type, tier | per-edition |
| **services_attach_rate** | exhibitors_with_services / total_exhibitors | edition, service_type | per-edition |
| **days_to_close** | AVG(contract_signed_date - first_contact_date) | edition, space_type | per-edition |
| **exhibitor_lifetime_editions** | AVG(editions_attended) | tier, category | per-edition |

## Data Pipeline

```
Bronze                          Silver                          Gold
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CRM export / spreadsheet  ──▶   dim_exhibitor +              ──▶  v_rebooking_rate
(exhibitor contacts,             fct_exhibitor_edition              v_exhibitor_retention
 rebooking records)              exhibitor_rebooking                v_services_attach_rate
```

## Cross-Context Data Requirements

| Data | Source Context | Source System |
|------|---------------|--------------|
| Exhibitor records | Exhibitor | CRM / spreadsheet |
| Rebooking records | Exhibitor | CRM / spreadsheet |
| Space assignments | Exhibition Space | Floor plan tool |
| Revenue data | Finance | QuickBooks |
| Service orders | Exhibitor | Service tracking |

## Benchmarks

| Segment | Target | Signal |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Overall rebooking rate | >= 80% | At parity with CEIR industry average |
| Listening room rebooking | >= 85% | Premium spaces should retain better |
| Net exhibitor growth | > 0 per edition | Brand count growing |
| Services attach rate | >= 15% | Industry norm per UFI |

## Capabilities

- rebooking-rate-tracking
- exhibitor-churn-analysis
- retention-cohort-reporting
- services-attach-analysis

## Feedback Loop

- **Measured in:** Exhibitor (post-show)
- **Consumed by:** Exhibitor (sales prioritization), Exhibition Space (next-edition planning)
- **Drives:** Sales team focus on at-risk exhibitors, pricing decisions, space allocation
- **Maturity path:** descriptive (current) → diagnostic (why did they churn?) → predictive (churn risk scoring)

## Related Patterns

- `exhibitor-lifecycle-management` — the domain pattern being measured
- `maximize-exhibitor-retention` — the goal pattern this analytics supports
